# Ankur Bag - Full Stack Developer & GenAI Builder

## About Me
Based in Kolkata, I'm a developer working at the intersection of design, engineering, and intelligent systems. Currently pursuing Information Technology (IT) at RCCIIT, I build products across web platforms, AI systems, and automation, turning ambitious ideas into real, usable software.

My work spans full-stack development, AI integrations, and scalable digital tools, with a strong focus on crafting interfaces that feel as good as they function. I care about building products that are not just technically solid, but thoughtfully designed and genuinely useful.

- **B.Tech:** IT
- **Location:** West Bengal, India
- **Focus:** Full Stack with GenAI
- **Status:** Active
- **Website:** https://www.ankurbag.tech
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/ankur-bag

---

## Experience

### Frontend Developer @ Resourcio Pvt. Ltd.
**Status:** INTERN | **Period:** Nov 2025 — Present
Architecting and developing frontend systems for multiple high-impact platforms:
- **Zynor** — AI image & video generation platform
- **Apertre 3.0** — 30-day open-source program by the Resourcio Community
- **Resourcio Official Website** — company website and digital presence
**Highlights:** Next.js, TypeScript

### Web Associate @ Google Developer's Groups on Campus RCCIIT
**Status:** Associate | **Period:** Oct 2025 — Present
Architected and developed the official website for Google Developer's Groups on Campus RCCIIT, enhancing the digital presence of the campus developer community.
**Highlights:** Next.js, Engineering, Web Associate

---

## Tech Stack

### Languages
TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C

### Web & Backend
Next.js, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Flask, MongoDB, Firebase, Socket.io, JWT

### UI, 3D & Animation
Framer Motion, GSAP, Three.js, WebGL, TailwindCSS

### Tools & Platforms
Git, GitHub, Vercel, Render, Postman

### Data & Design
Figma, Canva, NumPy, Pandas

---

## Projects

### 01. Bihaan 2025
**Category:** EVENT • UI/UX • ANIMATION
The official event website for RCCIIT's flagship festival Bihaan’25. Features complex Framer Motion choreographies and a seamless responsive architecture.
**Tech:** Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Animation
**Live URL:** https://bihan25.vercel.app/

### 02. GDGoC RCCIIT
**Category:** COMMUNITY • WEB • PORTAL
The official digital home for Google Developer Groups Community RCCIIT. A modern, high-performance portal showcasing vision, events, and initiatives.
**Tech:** Next.js, Typescript, Framer Motion, Frontend Libraries
**Live URL:** https://www.gdgcrcc.tech/

### 03. Cosmic Canvas
**Category:** AI • DESIGN • CREATIVITY
AI-generated designs with human-level control. Cosmic Canvas bridges the gap between raw AI creativity and precise, layer-based editing for professional results.
**Tech:** Hugging Face, Fabric.js, Python Flask
**Live URL:** https://cosmic-canvas-delta.vercel.app/

### 04. Zynor
**Category:** AI • GENERATION • MODEL
A cutting-edge Image and Video generation model platform. Built for high-speed creative output and seamless user interaction.
**Tech:** Frontend, Next.js, Typescript, Frammer Motion
**Live URL:** https://zynor-lyart.vercel.app/

### 05. Resourcio Pvt Ltd
**Category:** COMPANY • OFFICIAL • WEB
The official digital presence for Resourcio Pvt Ltd. A high-performance corporate platform showcasing services, mission, and professional impact.
**Tech:** Next.js, Typescript, Frontend, Frammer Motion
**Live URL:** https://www.resourcio.in/

### 06. CodeZen
**Category:** AI • DEVELOPMENT • TOOL
An AI-powered service using Google's Gemini model to analyze code snippets and provide structured, actionable, and detailed feedback to developers.
**Tech:** Gemini AI, Node.js, React
**Live URL:** https://ai-powered-code-reviewer-swart.vercel.app/

### 07. Attendance Buddy
**Category:** AUTOMATION • UTILITY • WEB
Engineered for efficiency. Tap-to-generate attendance lists for engineering lectures, eliminating the chore of manual roll-call collection.
**Tech:** HTML, CSS, JS, Automation
**Live URL:** https://attendance-buddy-three.vercel.app/
